Comment: inspect district catalog exception in container

commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T results-api python - <<"PY"
from hermes.results_api.app import district_catalog
try:
    districts = district_catalog.districts()
    print("DISTRICTS_LEN=" + str(len(districts)))
    if districts:
        print("FIRST_ID=" + str(districts[0].get("id")))
except Exception as exc:
    print("EXC_TYPE=" + exc.__class__.__name__)
    print("EXC_MSG=" + str(exc).encode("ascii", "backslashreplace").decode())
PY'
